hero.description: Creating stunning digital experiences with passion and precision. I transform innovative ideas into beautiful, functional websites that drive results and

about.title: About
about.name: Denis Bolba
about.description1: A passionate {age}-year-old entrepreneur and web designer from Oradea, Romania. With a keen eye for design and a strong understanding of user experience, I create websites that not only look stunning but also deliver exceptional functionality.
about.description2: My journey in web design began with a simple curiosity and has evolved into a professional career. I believe in creating digital experiences that leave a lasting impression and help businesses achieve their goals.

skills.title: Professional
skills.description: I've developed a wide range of skills throughout my journey as a web designer and entrepreneur. Here's a glimpse of my technical expertise.

webDesign.title: Web Design
webDesign.description: Creating beautiful, functional and responsive websites that provide exceptional user experiences.

uiux.title: UI/UX Design
uiux.description: Designing intuitive interfaces and experiences that users love, focusing on accessibility and usability.

development.title: Development
development.description: Building modern web applications with the latest technologies to deliver exceptional digital solutions.

projects.title: Recent
projects.description: Explore my latest web design and development projects. Each project represents my passion for creating beautiful, functional digital experiences.

lavanda.title: Lavanda Florarie
lavanda.description: Elegant e-commerce website for a premium flower shop featuring beautiful product galleries and seamless ordering.

bella.title: Bella Floraria
bella.description: Modern e-commerce platform for a florist with stunning floral arrangements showcase and intuitive shopping experience.

biciclete.title: Biciclete Copii
biciclete.description: Specialized online store for children's bicycles with detailed product catalogs and safety information.

contact.title: Get in
contact.description: Let's work together to bring your vision to life. Feel free to reach out for collaborations, consultations, or just to say hello.

form.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible. Looking forward to our conversation!
form.errorMessage: There was an issue sending your message. Please try again or contact me directly at contact@denisbolba.com
form.privacyNote: Your information is secure and will never be shared with third parties.

footer.description: Web designer and entrepreneur from Oradea, Romania. Creating stunning digital experiences with a focus on user-centered design and functionality.
footer.newsletterDescription: Subscribe to my newsletter to receive updates on my latest projects, insights, and exclusive offers.
footer.newsletterPrivacy: I respect your privacy. No spam, ever.
